# safe-start-for-codex - Startup surge prevention for Codex Desktop automations

> safe-start-for-codex is a Python-based Windows startup gate utility for managing local Codex Desktop automations. It temporarily pauses active automations upon startup, starts Codex Desktop, and then gradually restores the automations in a controlled, rate-limited sequence to avoid CPU/API spikes and startup congestion.

It includes optional background tray execution, startup cleanup of stale processes/lockfiles, and a conservative read-only catch-up planning feature for rare schedules that missed runs.

Part of the dev-bricks family. Python, MIT.

## Docs

- [README.md](https://github.com/dev-bricks/safe-start-for-codex/blob/main/README.md): Primary documentation, installation guide, foreground/tray usage, and options.
- [README_de.md](https://github.com/dev-bricks/safe-start-for-codex/blob/main/README_de.md): German localization.
- [docs/SOLUTION_CONCEPT.md](https://github.com/dev-bricks/safe-start-for-codex/blob/main/docs/SOLUTION_CONCEPT.md): Technical outline of the gating solution.
- [docs/UPSTREAM_ISSUE_PROPOSAL.md](https://github.com/dev-bricks/safe-start-for-codex/blob/main/docs/UPSTREAM_ISSUE_PROPOSAL.md): Draft proposal for implementing native startup pacing directly inside Codex Desktop.
- [LICENSE](https://github.com/dev-bricks/safe-start-for-codex/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT license text.

## Commands

- `safe-start-for-codex dry-run`: Simulates scanning and gating without modifying TOML files.
- `safe-start-for-codex backup`: Creates a snapshot of all active automation configurations.
- `safe-start-for-codex start`: Launches Codex Desktop and gates automations in the foreground.
- `safe-start-for-codex tray`: Launches as a background Windows tray application.
- `safe-start-for-codex status`: Prints current state of gated automations.
- `safe-start-for-codex config-init`: Generates a default `config.json` file.
- `safe-start-for-codex config-show`: Displays the active configuration.
- `safe-start-for-codex catchup-plan`: Lists missed runs for rare automations.
- `safe-start-for-codex restore-latest`: Forces restoration of the latest paused automations.

- [ellmos-controlcenter-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-controlcenter-mcp): MCP stack control plane.
